mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_NO, USER_NUM, CATEGORY_NO, PRODUCT_TITLE, PRODUCT_CONTENT, PRODUCT_CONDITION, PRICE, LOCATION, STATUS, ADMIN_HIDE_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userNum}, #{categoryNo}, #{productTitle}, #{productContent}, #{productCondition}, #{price}, #{location}, 'SALE', 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET PRODUCT_TITLE = #{productTitle}, PRODUCT_CONTENT = #{productContent}, PRODUCT_CONDITION = #{productCondition}, PRICE = #{price}, LOCATION = #{location}, STATUS = #{status}, MODIFY_DT = SYSDATE WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} AND USER_NUM = #{userNum}
mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCT_NO as productNo, USER_NUM as userNum, CATEGORY_NO as categoryNo, PRODUCT_TITLE as productTitle, PRODUCT_CONTENT as productContent, PRODUCT_CONDITION as productCondition, PRICE as price, LOCATION as location, STATUS as status, ADMIN_HIDE_YN as adminHideYn, HIDE_REASON as hideReason, VIEW_COUNT as viewCount, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createDt, TO_CHAR(MODIFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as modifyDt, LIKE_CNT as likeCnt, CHAT_CNT as chatCnt FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}

SELECT PRODUCT_NO as productNo, USER_NUM as userNum, CATEGORY_NO as categoryNo, PRODUCT_TITLE as productTitle, PRODUCT_CONTENT as productContent, PRODUCT_CONDITION as productCondition, PRICE as price, LOCATION as location, STATUS as status, ADMIN_HIDE_YN as adminHideYn, HIDE_REASON as hideReason, VIEW_COUNT as viewCount, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createDt, LIKE_CNT as likeCnt, CHAT_CNT as chatCnt FROM PRODUCT WHERE ADMIN_HIDE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC
